title: Gera Developments is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Gera Developments is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Gera Developments, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Gera Developments:
Gera Developments is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gera Developments!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
